title: Research Engineer, Machine Learning (Reinforcement Learning)
location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY
required_qualifications: Proficient in Python and async/concurrent programming with frameworks like Trio
Experience with machine learning frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX)
Industry experience in machine learning research
Ability to balance research exploration with engineering implementation
Care about code quality, testing, and performance
Strong systems design and communication skills
Passion for the potential impact of AI and commitment to developing safe and beneficial systems
preferred_qualifications: Familiarity with LLM architectures and training methodologies
Experience with reinforcement learning techniques and environments
Experience with virtualization and sandboxed code execution environments
Experience with distributed systems or high-performance computing
responsibilities: Collaborate with researchers and engineers to advance the capabilities and safety of large language models
Work on fundamental reinforcement learning research
Create 'agentic' models via tool use for open-ended tasks
education: Bachelor's degree in a related field or equivalent experience
